name: Halloween Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 12 ounces of orange juice concentrate, a 12 ounce bottle of white grape juice, 2 liters of 7-Up, and 1 pint of sherbet.
2. Add several drops of green food coloring to achieve the desired color (rum or vodka can be added for taste, if desired).
3. Serve with large, buoyant, well-washed plastic spiders on top.
Note: The original recipe also included additional ideas for Halloween-themed dishes and drinks, such as transforming sandwiches into jack-o'-lanterns, making edible spider treats, carving pumpkins, and decorating fruit salads or dips to enhance the spooky theme.
